archive_scope: IndiaBurma1944Photos folder-wide sortie-report inventory for the 12th Bombardment Group (M)
pairing_rule: For double-sided items, the backside image number is one greater than the front-side image number.
group_assumption: 12th Bombardment Group (M) for the full folder
group_assumption_basis: User confirmed all material in IndiaBurma1944Photos belongs to the 12th Bombardment Group.
note: Inventory covers the full folder as 12th Bombardment Group material. The extracts file now extends through October 30, 1944. Late-month rows were cleaned so all extracted missions have usable map anchors in the player; one October 29 air-radar mission uses an explicitly approximate Burma target anchor because the scan does not preserve a precise target coordinate or named location. The immediate tail of the folder includes October 31 operations memoranda, but no additional October 31 sortie-report front pages were confirmed in this pass.
